title: deyeuxia alba subsp. tricholemma
intro: Deyeuxia alba subsp. tricholemma, also known as white grass or Chinese silver grass, is a type of flowering plant native to China. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and improving respiratory health. Deyeuxia alba subsp. tricholemma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
